impact_summary: Cognitive Decline is increasingly being associated with prolonged microplastic exposure in the Cerebellum. Studies indicate that as microplastic accumulation increases, so does the severity of this condition. The progression can be gradual but leads to significant disruption in daily cognitive, emotional, or physical functions over time.
